user.title: Samsung SmartTags Setup
user.description: Configure your Samsung account region settings. If your Smart Tags use end-to-end encryption, enter your E2E PIN.

auth.title: Samsung Account Login
auth.description:
1. Open this link in your browser and log in to your Samsung account:

**[Samsung Login]({login_url})**

2. After logging in, your browser will try to open a `ms-app://` URL. Copy that **entire URL** from the address bar and paste it below.

error.connection: Cannot connect to Samsung servers. Please check your network.
error.invalid_redirect: Invalid redirect URL. Make sure you copied the complete ms-app:// URL.

abort.already_configured: This Samsung account is already configured.
